title: テナントガバナンス関係図
subtitle: 中核機能が各ガバナンス領域をつなぐ
longDescription: Hub and spoke relationship map placing identity governance at the center and connecting it to access reviews, entitlement management, lifecycle workflows, and audit as surrounding stakeholders.
designMessage: 設計メッセージ: 中核機能が各領域と双方向に連携し、統制を一貫させる
